title: cassia sophera subsp. purpurea
intro: Cassia sophera subsp. purpurea, also known as purple cassia, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family that is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cassia sophera subsp. purpurea include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Cassia sophera subsp. purpurea is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments and promote overall well-being.
